title: Azure SWA Custom Domain Validation Diagnostic
lead_source: Public GitHub issue reports Azure Static Web Apps custom-domain validation stuck in Validating or failing with empty errors, and mentions official paid support as a possible route: https://github.com/Azure/static-web-apps/issues/1745. No external comment was posted.
acceptance_statement: I accept the Azure SWA Custom Domain Validation Diagnostic fixed-scope terms at $100. I understand work starts only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; I will provide only public or buyer-authorized non-sensitive DNS, CLI, Bicep, and error-output evidence; the deliverable is limited to a diagnostic brief, evidence matrix, likely failure buckets, safe next commands to run, escalation packet, and workaround checklist; and Azure account login, private tenant/subscription access, official Microsoft support, production changes, DNS mutation, guaranteed resolution, ongoing support, or extra revisions are not included unless separately agreed before payment.
response_draft_not_posted: I saw this Static Web Apps custom-domain validation report and can offer a narrow fixed-scope diagnostic brief for $100. I would work only from public or redacted buyer-authorized DNS/CLI/Bicep evidence, without Azure credentials or private subscription access. The deliverable would be an evidence matrix, likely failure buckets, safe next commands, escalation packet, and workaround checklist; it would not replace official Microsoft support.
posting_boundary: The draft response is prepared but not posted. External public comments or direct outreach require explicit send approval.
money_rule: Count $0 until real buyer acceptance, seller-owned external payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.
